title: ZXSpace Guide
description: Complete ZXSpace guide covering city-defence shooting, controls, solo play, coins, achievements, leaderboards, and strategy.
summary: A compact ZXSpace guide for players while the app is Coming Soon.

sections.heading: Start here
paragraphs: ZXSpace is a short-session city-defence formation shooter: move the cannon, clear alien waves, protect shields and city buildings, and chase better scores.
For the current verified release-facing documentation, focus on the solo city-defence loop.

sections.heading: Core guide path
paragraphs: Read How to Play for the run loop, Controls for cannon movement, and Game Modes for current release status.
After that, use Coins, Achievements, Leaderboards, and Tips & Strategy to plan repeat sessions.
bullets: How to Play: goal, session flow, scoring, waves, and power-ups
Controls: touch-and-drag movement and continuous auto-fire
Game Modes: verified Solo play and Multiplayer availability pending final confirmation
Progression: BarkinMad Coins, achievements, leaderboards, and skins

sections.heading: Release check
paragraphs: This documentation is ready for release discovery while ZXSpace is Coming Soon, with only final approval-dependent metadata, mode verification, or artwork updates expected.
Some pages use shared supporting artwork where a dedicated ZXSpace screenshot is not required for the explanation.

images.caption: Dedicated page images will be added as artwork is released

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSpace complete guide
featureShowcases.summary: The Guide connects the full ZXSpace documentation set into one route through setup, play, progress, and support.
body: This matters because the ZX Series pages should feel consistent across all games. The guide helps players move from the overview into the exact page they need without losing context.
Players use this page as the main map when they want a complete explanation rather than a single topic.
bullets: Connects setup, controls, modes, tips, achievements, leaderboards, FAQ, and screenshots.
Keeps the documentation route consistent across ZXSnake, ZXBrick, ZXPong, and ZXSpace.
Uses the current game artwork to support the guide workflow.

image.caption: ZXSpace hero artwork represents the full guide route.

featureShowcases.heading: From play to progress
featureShowcases.summary: ZXSpace documentation explains what players do during a session and what they can review afterward.
body: This matters because arcade games are easy to start but deeper when players understand scoring, progress, and goals.
Players use the guide to connect active play with achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and support pages.
bullets: Supports both first-session learning and repeat play.
Keeps progression pages tied to gameplay.
Makes image presentation consistent with StudioDash and Game of Darts pages.

image.caption: ZXSpace supporting artwork connects gameplay with progress surfaces.
